spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the fundamental specification contract: comparing default greedy wrapping against row balance metrics side by side.

interactive.rationale: Provides click buttons to add or remove items, immediately updating both flex containers dynamically in-page.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Well aligned with the tag cloud use case, showing why wrapping tags looks better when balanced.

edge_cases.rationale: Shows multiple array dimensions by altering the item count dynamically.

references.rationale: Correctly provides the required ChromeStatus entry link in the list.

design_system.rationale: Clean paper panels and proper CSS variables in use.

summary: The balanced-tags concept is a solid, clear tag-cloud demonstration that helps developers visualize the difference between wrap and balance algorithms.
